summary: Tested Growth Engine UI shell for Emanator AI Builder. All backend APIs (19/19 tests) and frontend UI flows passed successfully. Features tested: Growth button in TopBar, GrowthPanel with URL input/Crawl button/pages list, crawl functionality, page detail view with extracted data, SEO analysis with AI-generated opportunities, delete functionality, and back navigation.

test_classes: TestGrowthAuthRequired (5 tests) - All endpoints return 401 without auth
TestGrowthCrawl (4 tests) - Crawl success, missing URL, empty URL, invalid URL
TestGrowthPages (4 tests) - List pages, get page by ID, nonexistent page, invalid ID
TestGrowthAnalyze (3 tests) - Analyze success with AI, missing page_id, nonexistent page
TestGrowthDelete (2 tests) - Delete page, delete nonexistent page

features_tested.feature: Growth button visible in TopBar after login
Pages list shows existing crawled pages
Entering URL and clicking Crawl adds page to list
Clicking crawled page shows detail panel with extracted data
Extracted data shows words, links, images, title, meta
Analyze SEO button visible on page detail
Clicking Analyze SEO shows loading then displays opportunities
SEO opportunities shows title_issues, meta_issues, content_issues, structure_issues, recommendations
Delete button on page item removes the page

seed_data_creation: Created multiple test pages during testing by crawling https://example.com
context_for_next_testing_agent: Growth Engine feature is fully functional. Backend APIs work correctly with auth (401 for unauthenticated requests). Frontend UI properly integrates with backend - crawl, analyze, list, get, delete all work. AI analysis uses GPT-4o via Emergent LLM Key and takes 5-10 seconds. Test pages may exist in MongoDB growth_pages collection from testing.
